title: Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple
tagline: Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple is located near Kanhangad in the Indian state of Kerala.
overview.description: Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple is located near Kanhangad in the Indian state of Kerala. It is one of the most prominent Hindu temples in Kasargod district, and is some 500 years old. It is dedicated to deity Kshetrapalakan Eswaran, the mother Goddess known as Kalarathri Amma (Bhadrakali). One of the oldest temples in North Kerala, Shri Madiyan Kulam is an ancient shrine.

topPlaces.name: Ajanur
topPlaces.description: Ajanur (also anglicized Ajanoor) is a grama panchayat and also a village of the same name in Kasaragod district of Kerala, India. It is the fifth largest town in Kasaragod district.

topPlaces.name: Kolavayal
topPlaces.description: Kolavayal is a place in Ajanur village in Kanhangad town, Kasargod district, Kerala, India. It is a good place.

topPlaces.name: Altharakkal Sree Muthappan Madapura
topPlaces.description: Altharakkal Sree Muthappan Madapura is a temple, located at Pullur Village about 6.2 km from Kanhangad and 25 km from Kasaragod City in Kasaragod District, Kerala. According to the local tradition the temple's deity, Muthappan, is a manifestation of the Hindu god Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Mavungal
topPlaces.description: Mavungal is a town in Kerala, India, situated just 3 km away from the city of Kanhangad. Mavungal is one of the busiest transport hubs in Kasaragod district.

topPlaces.name: Keekan
topPlaces.description: Keekan is a village in Kasaragod district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Athinhal
topPlaces.description: Athinhal is a coastal village in Kasaragod district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is 28 km from the district capital of Kasaragod and one kilometer north of Kanhangad.

topPlaces.name: Pallikkara, Bekal
topPlaces.description: Pallikkara is a census town and a grama panchayat in Hosdurg Taluk of Kasargod district in the state of Kerala, India. This place was once famous for its Tobacco plants until the late 1980s and the Historical landmark Bekal Fort lies in this Village.

topPlaces.name: Hosdurg Fort
topPlaces.description: Hosdurg Fort or Hosadurga Fort (transl. New fort), also known as Kanhangad Fort, is a fort in Kanhangad in Kasaragod district of Kerala, India. Somashekara Nayaka of the Keladi Nayaka dynasty of Ikkeri built the fort.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (71 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sree Madiyan Koolom Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ajanur, Kolavayal, Altharakkal Sree Muthappan Madapura, Mavungal, Keekan.
